expected_quirks: HN uses nested <table> layouts with no semantic tags — extractor's selector list won't match
Output is almost entirely top-bar navigation ('new | past | comments | ask...') and footer links
True content (story title, story URL, comment tree) requires HN-specific selectors
Strong candidate for domain-specific extraction rule OR adding 'table.fatitem' and '.comment-tree' to BASE_SELECTORS
notes: FIXTURE BROKEN: the fetched source.html is essentially chrome only (<4KB). Either the HN item ID no longer resolves or HN served a degenerate response to the Node UA. Replace the manifest URL with a live HN item (e.g. any currently-live https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=... with >100 comments) and re-fetch before this page can be scored. Extraction fixes still needed per notes below.
